briefdescription.para: GPIO interrupt controller API for STM32 MCUs.

detaileddescription.para: This API is used to interact with the GPIO interrupt controller of STM32 microcontrollers.
Opaque type representing a GPIO interrupt line

parameterdescription.para: GPIO pin on which interrupt occurred

simplesect.para: This callback is invoked in ISR context.

briefdescription.para: Get the GPIO interrupt line value corresponding to specified pin of GPIO port port.
Enable GPIO interrupts for specified line.
Disable GPIO interrupts for specified line.
Select trigger for interrupt on specified GPIO line.
Set callback invoked when an interrupt occurs on specified GPIO line.

parameterdescription.para: Custom user data for usage by the callback

simplesect.para: 0 on success, -EBUSY if a callback is already set for line

briefdescription.para: Removes the interrupt callback of specified EXTI line.
